title: howardia febrifuga
intro: Howardia febrifuga, also known as California fever plant or desert marigold, is a perennial herb native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to reduce fever and relieve headaches due to its analgesic and anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits of Howardia febrifuga include its potential to treat colds, sore throats, and other respiratory issues, as well as its use as a topical treatment for skin irritations and wounds. Howardia febrifuga can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or salves, and is often used in traditional herbal medicine to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health complaints.
